specific_question: How many distinct smartphone models and iOS versions does the Elexion Automotive quality assurance team currently test for connectivity compatibility?
answer: As of December 2024, the Elexion Automotive quality assurance team tests connectivity compatibility across 87 distinct smartphone models, 15 iOS versions and 22 Android versions, with plans to expand to 120 devices by 2025.
dr_question: How can Elexion Automotive's quality assurance testing protocols prioritize Apple CarPlay and Android Auto connectivity performance by Q4 2025 for 2026 EV models to differentiate from competitors and attract 50% of Apple users and 42% of Samsung users who depend on smartphone connections every drive?
